notes: v1.2.38: Removed QApplication.processEvents() and hide/show cycle from _do_capture — these were causing the dialog's exec() to return prematurely. v1.2.37: DISABLED global hotkeys (pynput) — they interfere with Qt modal dialogs. v1.2.36: Added logging to ImageDialog accept/reject/closeEvent. v1.2.35: Fixed QApplication.processEvents() loop with QEventLoop. v1.2.34: Fixed updater batch script bug.
